output: Batch 8 executed. The remaining queue bug is fixed in AgentChat.tsx: failed queued heads now pause the drain while they remain at the front of the queue, and deleting that failed head allows the next queued message to send. Feature-level verification is green: npm test -- AgentChat passes, and a temporary /tmp/verify-agentchat-queue.sh verifier was created, run against the queue-processing, duplicate-text, and forced-error scenarios, and then deleted. Checkpoint written to .megaplan/plans/add-a-message-queue-to-the-20260414-1343/execution_batch_8.json.
deviations: Repo-wide final validation is still red outside this feature area. npm run lint reports many unrelated existing lint errors across other domains/files, and npx tsc -p tsconfig.app.json --noEmit reports unrelated existing type errors outside AgentChat.

task_updates.executor_notes: Updated src/tools/video-editor/components/AgentChat/AgentChat.tsx to prevent queued-send auto-retries after a failure by tracking a paused failed-head id and blocking the drain while that item remains at the front of the queue; removing the failed head clears the pause and resumes draining. Verification: npx eslint src/tools/video-editor/components/AgentChat/AgentChat.tsx src/tools/video-editor/components/AgentChat/AgentChat.test.tsx passes, npm test -- AgentChat passes, and a temporary /tmp/verify-agentchat-queue.sh script was written, run to confirm the processing/duplicate-text/failed-head scenarios, and deleted. Final repo-wide checks still fail due to unrelated pre-existing issues outside this feature: npm run lint reports many existing lint errors across unrelated domains/files, and npx tsc -p tsconfig.app.json --noEmit reports existing type errors outside AgentChat.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Yes. npm test -- AgentChat passes, and a temporary /tmp/verify-agentchat-queue.sh verifier was created, run to confirm the queue-while-processing, duplicate-text, and forced-error scenarios, and then deleted.
